provenance.title: EVOLVEMEM: Self-Evolving Memory Architecture via AutoResearch for LLM Agents
provenance.abstract: Long-term memory is essential for LLM agents that operate across multiple sessions, yet existing memory systems treat retrieval infrastructure as fixed. We present EVOLVEMEM, a self-evolving memory architecture that exposes its full retrieval configuration as a structured action space optimized by an LLM-powered diagnosis module.
key_claims: Existing memory systems freeze retrieval infrastructure while only evolving stored content
EVOLVEMEM co-evolves stored knowledge AND retrieval mechanisms via an AutoResearch loop
Self-evolution loop: EVALUATE–DIAGNOSE–PROPOSE–GUARD with automatic revert-on-regression
25.7% relative improvement over strongest baseline on LoCoMo; 18.9% on MemBench
Evolved configurations transfer across benchmarks with positive (not catastrophic) transfer

architecture.description: Three-layer system connected by a self-evolution feedback loop

fields.mu: memory type from six-category taxonomy T
fields.e: dense embedding vector in R^d (d=768 for BGE)
fields.eta: metadata: importance, confidence, entity-reinforcement score, entities, topics, creation_timestamp

extractor.method: Sliding window of length W=40 turns over source conversation
failure_guards: Retry with increasing wait intervals on LLM call failure
Chunk-split into C=15 turn sub-windows when context exceeds limit
Coverage verifier: re-extract if reference keywords missing from extracted memories

entity_reinforcement.increment: delta_rho = 0.05 per entity co-occurrence with query

lexical.formula: skw(q, mi) = sum_t IDF(t) * f(t,ci)*(k1+1) / (f(t,ci) + k1*(1-b+b*|ci|/|c_avg|))

semantic.formula: ssem(q, mi) = cos(eq, ei) = eq^T * ei / (||eq|| * ||ei||)

structured_metadata.formula: sstr(q, mi) = sum_{f in {persons,locations,entities}} I[extract_f(q) ∩ eta_{i,f} != empty]

fusion.final_ranking_formula: s(q, mi; theta) = sfuse(q, mi; theta) + lambda_iota * iota_i + lambda_r * rec(mi) + rho_i
fusion.recency_function: non-increasing function of age, parameterized by time_decay_half_life_days

entity_swap.description: Strip person names from query, re-search by topic, union with original
entity_swap.formula: qswap = q \ {p: p in persons(q)}, R_swap = R_fuse(qswap)

query_decomposition.description: LLM decomposes multi-hop query into <= Nsub single-hop sub-queries, merge via RRF
query_decomposition.formula: {q1,...,qK} = psi_dec(q), K <= Nsub; R_dec = union_k R(qk; theta)

answer_generation.base: yhat_0 = psi_ans(q, R(q; theta), alpha) where alpha is style config

verification.formula: yhat = psi_ver(q, R, yhat_0) if conf(yhat_0) < tau_ver or yhat_0 in U, else yhat_0

action_space.theta_components: theta = (ksem, kkw, kstr, Bctx, mode, {wv}, alpha, {theta_c}_{c in C})

layer_3_evolution_engine.name: Self-Evolution Engine (AutoResearch loop)
layer_3_evolution_engine.objective: theta* = argmax_{theta in Theta} F(theta; K, Q) = (1/|Q|) * sum score(yhat(q;theta,K), y*)

update_rule.revert: if f_{r-1} - f_r > tau_rev → theta_{r+1} = theta*_{r-1} (best so far)
update_rule.explore: if |f_r - f_{r-1}| < epsilon for 2 rounds → theta_{r+1} = theta_r ⊕ eta_exp (random perturbation)

diagnosis_module.input: per-question raw log L_r = {(qj, yhat_j, y*_j, score_j, R(qj; theta_r))}
diagnosis_module.output: structured proposal Delta_theta_r with root_causes, parameter_suggestions, per_category_proposals

convergence.condition: f_r - f_{r-1} < epsilon (default 0.005) or r >= Rmax

layer_3_evolution_engine.coverage_gap_handling: if diagnosis detects missing keywords → targeted re-extraction K_{r+1} = K_r ∪ phi_ext_targeted(S, V_miss_r)

variables.r_v: rank of m_i in view v

equations.name: Evolution Objective
equations.latex: \theta^* = \arg\max_{\theta \in \Theta} F(\theta; K, Q) = \frac{1}{|Q|} \sum_{(q,y^*) \in Q} \text{score}(\hat{y}(q; \theta, K), y^*)

equations.name: Update Rule (three-branch)
equations.role: Evolution — meta-analyzer update with safety guards

equations.name: Coverage-Gap Re-extraction
equations.role: Evolution — augment memory store when coverage gaps detected

tensors.name: L_r
tensors.description: Per-question raw log at round r

tensor_semantics.notes: Paper does not specify batch dimensions for retrieval — single-query inference implied

training_pipeline.notes: EVOLVEMEM has no gradient-based training. The 'training' is the self-evolution loop.

evaluation_protocol.compute: Apple M-series CPU (no GPU required for memory system); LLM calls via Azure OpenAI

implementation_assumptions.basis: literature default for RRF; paper does not specify
common practice; paper says 'increasing wait intervals' without count

implementation_assumptions.assumption: lambda_iota and lambda_r (weights for importance and recency in final ranking) default to 1.0
implementation_assumptions.basis: not specified in paper; equal weighting assumed
paper explicitly states SQLite/FTS5 and BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5
Appendix D.2 explicitly states batch size 32

ambiguities.description: lambda_iota and lambda_r are introduced but never assigned default values
tau_ver (answer verification confidence threshold) not defined numerically
RRF smoothing constant k value not given
